data.body:
## Description

**What**: Create redirect stubs for old skill names (/dso:project-setup, /dso:dev-onboarding, /dso:design-onboarding) and add architect-foundation offer at end of onboarding
**Why**: Users with muscle memory or existing documentation referencing old names need clear guidance; the architect-foundation follow-up should be discoverable
**Scope**:
- IN: Redirect SKILL.md stubs for all three old skill directories; clear guidance message pointing to /dso:onboarding; onboarding completion flow offering /dso:architect-foundation invocation
- OUT: Script/config consumer updates for old skill names (S9); the actual new skills (S2, S7)

## Done Definitions

- When this story is complete, invoking /dso:project-setup, /dso:dev-onboarding, or /dso:design-onboarding displays a clear message redirecting the user to /dso:onboarding
  ← Satisfies: "invoking any old name redirects with guidance to use /dso:onboarding"
- When this story is complete, at the end of /dso:onboarding, the user is offered the option to invoke /dso:architect-foundation
  ← Satisfies: "At completion, /dso:onboarding offers the user the option to invoke /dso:architect-foundation"
- When this story is complete, unit tests written and passing for all new or modified logic

## Considerations

- [Testing] Redirect mechanism needs tests for all three old skill names

## Escalation Policy

**Escalation policy**: Proceed unless a significant assumption is required to continue — one that could send the implementation in the wrong direction. Escalate only when genuinely blocked without a reasonable inference. Document all assumptions made without escalating.
